title: Laboratory Operation Assistant (1 year contract)
description:
Job Description

  • Support laboratory daily operations and facility management as directed by Team Leader/Manager
  • Perform administrative tasks, printing, filing, scanning, invoicing, procurement of office supplies and lab consumables, updating SOP, attending to incoming phone calls and visitor reception
  • Manage laboratory reagent and consumables inventory, including stock level monitoring, usage tracking, expiry date control, and replenishment planning to ensure uninterrupted lab operations.
  • Perform tasks related to Internal and external archiving (documents & media tapes)
  • Contact sites / customers via email or phone when required by daily operations
  • Generate documents and reports as required by daily operations
  • Support Operation in daily purchasing activities
  • Provide guidance for users/ requestors / suppliers of the lab
  • Place Purchase Order and follow up with supplier for goods/services delivery & receipt.
  • Participate to supplier Selection, qualification and price negotiation 
  • Be primary contact person to finance team, Purchasing team & Lab for inventory and or sourcing (estimated quantity, technical requirement from lab for a product/service)
  • Cooperate with Finance Team, Purchase team to source alternatives (better suppliers / better products in aspect of commercial terms, and help to follow with lab to approve new source
  • Other purchasing tasks and expense reporting as assigned by supervisor

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma and above
  • Proficient in both English and Mandarin
  • Motivated individual with excellent time management and strong attention to details
  • Immediate availability is preferred

postedCompany.description:
At Eurofins Central Laboratory, we are BOLD. We go beyond the expected. Since we are purely a central laboratory, there are no distractions allowing us to remain laser-focused on the best science, technology and people so you get what you deserve.

You will benefit from the fact that we are part of one of the world’s leading lab organizations. This means you’ll enjoy end-to-end testing solutions, free from the worry of coordinating multiple vendors. Our testing capabilities are unsurpassed and we are setting new standards with our GLP capabilities embedded within the Central Lab.
postedCompany.name: EUROFINS CENTRAL LABORATORY PTE. LTD.
